title: centella hederifolia
intro: Centella hederifolia, also known as Gotu Kola, is a perennial plant native to Asia and Africa, belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Centella hederifolia include improved cognitive function, wound healing, skin health, and stress reduction, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and skincare products. Centella hederifolia can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or topical cream, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
